channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: TSX Starts the Week Strong
item.description: The S P/TSX Composite Index advanced 1.8% to close at 31,884 on Monday, as easing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East triggered a sharp rotation back into risk assets. The reversal came on the heels of President Trump’s announcement of a five-day pause on planned strikes against Iranian energy infrastructure, a decision that promptly deflated ... Fuente: InstaForex

item.title: Dollar Declines and Gold Plunges in Hopes Iran War Will Soon End
item.description: The dollar index (DXY00 ) fell to a 1.5-week low on Monday and finished down by -0.65%. The dollar gave up overnight gains and turned lower as stocks rallied sharply after President Trump postponed attacks against Iranian energy infrastructure and power plants for five days following the start of talks... Fuente: Nasdaq FX

item.title: Economic and event calendar in Asia Tuesday, March 24, 2026 0 Japan inflation data
item.description: Japan’s national inflation data for February is due later today, with the release expected to mirror the softer tone seen in the Tokyo CPI figures earlier in the month. The Tokyo data showed underlying price pressures moderating, with core inflation slipping back below the Bank of Japan’s 2% target. This has reinforced the near-term case for mainta... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Fed’s Daly flags two economic paths as Middle East risks cloud policy outlook
item.description: Daly signalled the Fed is navigating a highly uncertain outlook driven by geopolitical risks, with policy likely to remain flexible rather than guided by a fixed path. Summary: Daly outlines two scenarios tied to Middle East conflict trajectory Quick resolution → energy spike seen as temporary, policy can look through it Prolonged conflict → risks ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: RBNZ’s Breman signals rate hike risk if energy shock drives persistent inflation
item.description: RBNZ signalled it will look through temporary energy-driven inflation but stands ready to hike rates if persistent price pressures threaten inflation expectations. Summary: RBNZ flags two-path outlook tied to Middle East-driven energy shock Short-lived spike → policymakers to look through petrol-driven inflation Prolonged disruption → risk of highe... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: investingLive Americas FX news wrap 23 Mar: The hope for peace lifted markets today.
item.description: Doubline's Gundlach: No terribly enthusiastic about credit markets or stocks at this time. Ominous: Thousands of US Marines are slated to arrive in the Middle East on Friday Oil plunges as Iran tensions ease. Crude oil futures settle at $88.13 Netanyahu spoke with Trump: Says war achievements can be leveraged into deal Markets tentatively embrace T... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Doubline's Gundlach: No terribly enthusiastic about credit markets or stocks at this time.
item.description: Gold was so wildly overdue for a correction. I think it is a very good opportunity to gold, commodities at this level Our inflaiton model shows we are heading to 3.5% inflation I don't think we will get a hike with the current structure The private credit market remain very murky I don't think investors should be calling for a rate cut. The market ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Ominous: Thousands of US Marines are slated to arrive in the Middle East on Friday
item.description: In the lead-up to the war in Iran, there were all kinds of conflicting signals about what was coming. It was confusing and much of it was designed to misdirect. Evidently it worked as Iran's leaders met to discuss negotiations and the US/Israel used that to kill them. When I look back at the signs, the giveaway that a war was coming was the relentl... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Oil plunges as Iran tensions ease. Crude oil futures settle at $88.13
item.description: Crude oil futures are settling sharply lower, down -$10.10 (-10.28%) to $88.13, after trading in a wide range between a high of $101.67 and a low of $84.37. The catalyst for the selloff came after President Trump’s Truth Social post, which signaled productive talks between the U.S. and Iran and a five-day postponement of planned strikes on Iranian ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: AUD/USD steadies as Trump delays Iran strikes, risk sentiment improves
item.description: AUD/USD trades little changed on Monday after recovering from earlier losses, following US President Donald Trump's decision to delay planned strikes on Iran’s energy infrastructure, easing immediate geopolitical tensions and improving overall risk appetite. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Markets tentatively embrace Trump's claims that a peace deal is likely
item.description: Do you trust Trump? That's the question that every market participant is asking today. The US President said several times today that the White House has had discussions with Iran about ending strikes and opening up the Strait of Hormuz. The problem is that Iran has denied every claim. There are possible reason for the mess of information including... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: USD/CHF retreats as easing Middle East tensions weigh on US Dollar
item.description: USD/CHF trades lower around 0.7870 on Monday, down 0.12% at the time of writing, as the US Dollar (USD) weakens following a temporary easing of geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Global liquidity squeeze, HSI sharply lower on Trump ultimatum & the week ahead
item.description: We join OANDA Senior Market Analyst Kelvin Wong and podcast host Jonny Hart in today’s episode, recapping today’s Asia session after Trump’s ultimatum to Iran regarding the Strait of Hormuz. Otherwise, we also look ahead to this week’s trading, with particular focus on upcoming PMI and inflation data. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: Goldman Sachs raises its US recession probability
item.description: The Wall Street Journal is reporting that rising energy prices tied to Middle East tensions are beginning to reshape the economic outlook, with Goldman Sachs warning that higher oil and gas costs, tighter financial conditions, and fading fiscal support are increasing downside risks for growth while lifting recession probabilities. Recession risk ri... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: Further consolidation should not be ruled out
item.description: For now, the near-term outlook for the Australian Dollar (AUD) remains constructive, underpinned by persistently high inflation in Australia and the RBA’s hawkish bias. This backdrop is likely to support further upside in AUD/USD while also offering a cushion against periodic pullbacks. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: NZD/USD edges higher as US Dollar weakens on geopolitical developments
item.description: NZD/USD trades around 0.5850 on Monday at the time of writing, up 0.24% on the day, benefiting from a broader pullback in the US Dollar (USD) amid a relative easing of geopolitical tensions. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USDCHF breaks the 200 hour MA and runs to swing area support.
item.description: The USDCHF has been respecting its key technical levels, with the 200-hour moving average playing a central role in recent price action. On Friday—and again during the Asian-Pacific session today—the pair found support against the 200-hour moving average (currently at 0.7872). Buyers leaned against that level, helping to stabilize the downside and ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Eurozone: Firmer growth and eventual ECB hikes – BNP Paribas
item.description: BNP Paribas projects Eurozone growth at 1.6% in 2026, supported by German fiscal measures, higher military and AI-related investment, and a resilient labour market. Inflation is expected to stay below 2% in 2026 before gradually accelerating in 2027. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD/JPY: Energy shock and flows point higher – MUFG
item.description: MUFG analysts see recent Yen weakness as fundamentally justified and expect further downside for the Japanese Yen if the Middle East crisis persists. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB: Early insurance hike risks and data focus – Societe Generale
item.description: Societe Generale economists Fabien Bossy, Michel Martinez, Anatoli Annenkov and Sam Cartwright argue that the ECB is edging toward discussing early insurance rate hikes after the recent energy shock. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USDCAD sets the high from last week setting the ceiling and 200 hour MA the floor.
item.description: The USDCAD edged to a marginal new high for the year—stretching just a pip beyond the January 23 peak to 1.3755 (vs. 1.3754)—before quickly running into resistance. From there, price action reversed sharply following the Trump Truth Social headline, triggering a swift move lower. That downside momentum carried the pair into a key confluence zone, i... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: USD/JPY falls sharply as geopolitical easing weighs on US Dollar
item.description: USD/JPY falls by 0.40% on Monday and trades around 158.60 at the time of writing, after dropping from the 159.60 area to an intraday low near 158.25, as the US Dollar (USD) weakens following an unexpected geopolitical development. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BoC: Rates seen on extended hold – TD Securities
item.description: TD Securities strategists Robert Both and Emma Lawrence expect the Bank of Canada (BoC) to keep the overnight rate at 2.25% throughout 2026, despite markets pricing significant tightening. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: GBP/USD: BoE repricing challenges rate cut view – OCBC
item.description: OCBC highlights that the Bank of England’s (BoE) latest communication has triggered aggressive market repricing, with almost 85 bps of hikes now priced for 2026. This makes the bank’s previously expected BoE cut in 3Q26 less certain, with an extended hold more plausible. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/USD Observa Presión Bajista y Puntos de Soporte Clave - 23 marzo 2026
item.description: EUR/USD sigue bajo presión, con soportes y resistencias vigiladas por inversores. Factores como la guerra en Irán y el petróleo influyen en la dinámica reciente del par. Fuente: DailyForex ES

item.title: ECB's Kazimir: Will not hesitate to act if inflation was at risk of staying above target
item.description: Will not hesitate to act if inflation was at risk of staying above target for a prolonged period We can do little about the inflation spike in the next few months Supply chains beyond energy are at risk Every future meeting is open and live We are yet to leave our "good place" Clear upside risks for inflation and downside risks for growth The ECB i... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Panic at pumps, energy bill pain and surging food costs: Starmer holds crisis talks on potential Iran war fallout TODAY as he vows to use 'every lever' to help families... but can he even afford a bailout?
item.description: Keir Starmer will gather senior ministers and the Bank of England governor in Whitehall amid fears of panic at pumps, an inflation timebomb for energy and food bills, and interest rate rises. Fuente: NewsData GBP

item.title: Nigeria’s Oil Earnings Drop to $31.5bn Amid Gas Boom
item.description: Nigeria recorded $31.54 billion in crude oil exports in 2025, down from the previous year despite higher production, according to data from the Central Bank of Nigeria. With oil revenues falling from $36.85 billion in 2024, the most recent balance of payments report underlines continuing obstacles in the main source of income for the [...] Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: ‘War has costs’: Iran defends $2 million transit fee for ships crossing Hormuz
item.description: Iran starts charging $2M per ship in the Strait of Hormuz. Move defies Trump’s 48-hour deadline. Brent crude hits $120 as shipping insurance premiums skyrocket. Fuente: NewsData JPY

item.title: USD Gains, Investors Flee Risk on Escalating Middle East War
item.description: Dollar climbs as stocks tumble on Iran war IEA39;s Birol warns crisis worse than 1970s oil shocks Japan says ready to counter forex volatility TOKYOLONDON, March 23 Reuters The dollar rose on Monday as escalating retaliatory threats in the Middle East conflict sent stocks tumbling and lifted demand for safehaven assets. Hopes for an offramp to host... Fuente: NewsData AUD
